ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address of the household */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people living in the household */,
  "income" TEXT /* Annual household income */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., single, family, shared) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the household information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household the person belongs to */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "composite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the composite characteristic */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the person's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_composite_id FOREIGN KEY ("composite_id") REFERENCES composites ("composite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "composites" (
  "composite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composite characteristic */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "composite_name" TEXT /* Name of the composite characteristic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the composite characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the address information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the city information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the state information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the country information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
